mapper.select: SELECT -- TM: 팀 기본 정보 T.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, -- TM_STDM: 홈 구장 ID TS.STDM_ID AS HOME_STDM_ID FROM TM T LEFT JOIN TM_STDM TS ON TS.TM_ID = T.TM_ID WHERE T.TM_ID = #{tmId} LIMIT 1
SELECT -- TM: 팀 기본 정보 T.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, -- TM_STDM: 홈 구장 ID TS.STDM_ID AS HOME_STDM_ID FROM TM T LEFT JOIN TM_STDM TS ON TS.TM_ID = T.TM_ID ORDER BY T.TM_ID

SELECT -- PLR: 선수 기본 정보 P.PLR_ID, P.TM_ID, P.PLR_OVRL_ABLT AS OVRL_ABLT, -- PLR_TM_CNTRCT: 대표 포지션 PC.REPR_POSN_CD, -- PLR_POSN: 주 포지션 (숙련도 최고 기준) (SELECT PP.POSN_CD FROM PLR_POSN PP WHERE PP.PLR_ID = P.PLR_ID ORDER BY PP.POSN_PRFC_ABLT DESC LIMIT 1) AS POSN_CD FROM PLR P JOIN PLR_TM_CNTRCT PC ON PC.PLR_ID = P.PLR_ID AND (PC.FA_CNTRCT_END_DT >= CURDATE() OR PC.FA_CNTRCT_END_DT IS NULL) WHERE P.TM_ID IS NOT NULL AND P.PLR_STTS_CD = 'AT' -- 활동 선수만 ORDER BY P.TM_ID, P.PLR_OVRL_ABLT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SSNT ( SSNT_YR, SSNT_STTS_CD, SSNT_BGNG_DT, REG_SSNT_BGNG_DT, REG_SSNT_END_DT, PSTSSNT_BGNG_DT, PSTSSNT_END_DT, SSNT_END_DT, CUR_DT ) VALUES ( #{ssntYr}, 'PRE', #{ssntBgngDt}, #{regSsntBgngDt}, #{regSsntEndDt}, #{pstssntBgngDt}, #{pstssntEndDt}, #{ssntEndDt}, #{curDt} )

INSERT INTO STND (TM_ID, SSNT_YR, W, L, T, STND_RNK) VALUES
(#{s.tmId}, #{s.ssntYr}, 0, 0, 0, #{s.rank})

INSERT INTO PLR_ENTY (PLR_ID, SSNT_YR, TM_ID, ENTY_LVL_CD, ENTY_DT) VALUES
(#{e.plrId}, #{e.ssntYr}, #{e.tmId}, '1', #{e.entyDt})

INSERT INTO TM_LINEUP (TM_ID, SSNT_YR, LINEUP_NO, PLR_ID, POSN_CD) VALUES
(#{l.tmId}, #{l.ssntYr}, #{l.lineupNo}, #{l.plrId}, #{l.posnCd})

INSERT INTO TM_ROTATION (TM_ID, SSNT_YR, ROT_ORD, PLR_ID) VALUES
(#{r.tmId}, #{r.ssntYr}, #{r.rotOrd}, #{r.plrId})

INSERT INTO TM_BULLPEN (TM_ID, SSNT_YR, PLR_ID, ROLE_CD) VALUES
(#{b.tmId}, #{b.ssntYr}, #{b.plrId}, #{b.roleCd})

INSERT INTO GAME (SSNT_YR, GAME_DT, HOME_TM_ID, AWAY_TM_ID, STDM_ID, GAME_STTS_CD, GAME_TYPE_CD) VALUES
(#{g.ssntYr}, #{g.gameDt}, #{g.homeTmId}, #{g.awayTmId}, #{g.stdmId}, '01', 'REG')

INSERT INTO SSNT_EVNT (SSNT_YR, EVNT_DT, TM_ID, EVNT_TYPE_CD, EVNT_TTLT, EVNT_CNTS) VALUES
(#{e.ssntYr}, #{e.evntDt}, #{e.tmId}, #{e.evntTypeCd}, #{e.evntTtlt}, #{e.evntCnts})
